generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for each drive axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder positioned behind the gearbox for each drive axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataStream
]

instance MotorEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Time series sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SensorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated position data from motor and secondary encoders using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream, SecondaryEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ProcessingEnabler
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission mechanism following the motor for subsequent axes"
]

instance CycloidalGearMechanism : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear component used in the robot's drive system"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller processing control inputs for the robot"
]

instance SafetyCell : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Safety cell enforcing maximum working range constraints to prevent hazardous operations"
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for structural modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical layers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams defining component interfaces, interconnections, and compositions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machines for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model for architecture description of component interfaces and compositions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc model for component interfaces and compositions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink executable simulation models representing physical behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CppCodeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ code for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppCompilerEnabler
]

instance JavaCodeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java code for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaCompilerEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for component & connector modeling of the robot's structure"
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL tool for architecture description"
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc tool for component and behavioral modeling"
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for executable simulation models"
]

instance CppCompilerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for analytical simulations"
]

instance JavaCompilerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java compiler for analytical simulations"
]

instance ProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component handling computational steps for analytics and insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time analysis of friction loss and system relations for monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization services to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight, AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard interface for user interaction and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into joint friction levels for improved understanding"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into robot motion accuracy for optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data for user interpretation via dashboard"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial manufacturing environment where precise motion control is critical"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearMechanism, SiemensSINUMERIK840DController, SafetyCell, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, AASComponent, ProblemIdentificationStep, AssetModelAnalysisStep, CalculationModelCreationStep, DataIdentificationStep
]

instance AASComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for live-data linking and aggregation"
]

instance ProblemIdentificationStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Problem identification step in the digital shadow creation process"
]

instance AssetModelAnalysisStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Asset and model analysis step in the digital shadow creation process"
]

instance CalculationModelCreationStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Use or creation of calculations or models step in the digital shadow creation process"
]

instance DataIdentificationStep : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data identification step in the digital shadow creation process"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical control flows exist, as the system operates as a digital shadow with a strictly one-way data flow from physical to virtual, functioning as a passive entity that does not push data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow maintains a one-way data flow from the physical object's real-time state to the digital object, capturing live measurements for synchronization, though specific synchronization frequencies and latency requirements are not explicitly specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) defines a UML class diagram-based architecture with three core components: Asset (physical entity representation), Model (digital abstraction), and Processing (data aggregation and transformation logic), coordinating data flow from physical to digital systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity considerations account for uncertainty sources including load variations, temperature fluctuations, and wear over time. Validation involves comparing simulated data against measured data to quantify deviations, with the sensor arrangement specifically designed to minimize backlash and positional uncertainty. Quality assurance processes include continuous verification of model accuracy through empirical data comparison."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linking, though specific network topology, bandwidth, latency, or security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems using Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange, MQTT protocol for lightweight messaging, and dependency on Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for industrial control system interfacing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Industry standards such as SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], and MontiArc [25] are utilized for architecture description and system modeling, with SysML IBDs defining component & connector structures and state machines in SysML v1.7 for behavior specification, while MontiArc Automaton and AADL support detailed system behavior and component interactions."
]
